$comment: D-P6 Layer 2 outcome extraction — Spaarke Insights Engine Phase 1. Realized via AiAnalysisNodeExecutor per Q5 audit (no new node executor). Conditional invocation per D-P7 ingest playbook (gated by Layer 1 outcome ∈ {closing_letter, settlement_agreement, opinion_judgment} AND confidence >= 0.7 per D-59). Output feeds three mechanical gates downstream: D-P9 GroundingVerifier -> D-P10 ConfidenceThresholdOptions -> D-P10 ObservationEmitter.
name: Layer 2 — Outcome Extraction

knowledgeRetrieval.$comment-mode: Auto: retrieves linked RagIndex knowledge sources when present (e.g., extraction-rubric reference docs); skips silently when none linked. L2 document context off (Layer 2 is fact extraction from the single source document, not comparative analysis). L3 entity context off (matter context is supplied via Scope on ExtractionResult downstream by the ingest playbook).

outputSchema.$comment-retry: Per task 031 acceptance: validator rejects malformed output BEFORE downstream gates; one retry on schema-validation failure (matches IOpenAiClient.GetStructuredCompletionAsync semantics for constrained-decoding fallback).

downstreamGates.$comment: Each non-null evidence quote is mechanically verified against the source-document chunks from spaarke-files-index. Unverified quotes drop the corresponding field BEFORE confidence gating runs.
Per-field thresholds (Phase 1 starters: outcomeCategory>=0.75, settlementAmount>=0.85, outcomeDate>=0.85, matterDurationDays>=0.75); admin-tunable via IOptionsMonitor without restart per D-63.

Surviving fields are emitted as one ObservationArtifact each with producedBy.Id=playbook://outcome-extraction@v1, version=v1; evidence array carries the verbatim document quote plus the playbook-run ref.

gating.$comment-conditional: Per SPEC-phase-1-minimum.md §3.3 + D-59: Layer 2 fires only when Layer 1 (classification@v1) returned classification in {closing_letter, settlement_agreement, opinion_judgment} AND confidence >= 0.7. The condition is owned by the D-P7 ingest playbook (task 040), not by this node config; documented here as the contract this node assumes.

inputSanitization.$comment: Document content MUST pass through ISanitizer (D-A25) before reaching this node. Sanitization is wired at the SpeContentRetrieve stage in the D-P7 ingest playbook (task 040), upstream of this node.
